About Darpan Enterprises

With over 15 years of experience in electronics and electrical repair, Darpan Enterprises has become the most trusted name in Chinchwad. We specialize in providing quick, reliable, and affordable repair solutions for all types of electronic and electrical devices.

Our team of certified technicians uses state-of-the-art equipment and genuine parts to ensure your devices are repaired to the highest standards. We believe in transparent pricing, quality workmanship, and customer satisfaction above all else.

Our Premium Services

Comprehensive repair solutions for all your electronic and electrical needs

TV & Audio Systems

Expert repair of televisions, speakers, home theater systems, amplifiers, and all audio equipment. Panel replacement and complete system servicing available.

Mobile Device Repair

Expert repair of smartphones and tablets. Screen replacement, battery issues, water damage, charging problems, and complete hardware restoration with genuine parts.

Laptop & Desktop Repair

Professional computer repair services including motherboard replacement, hard drive issues, RAM upgrades, software problems, and complete system diagnostics.

Electrical Appliances & Kitchen Appliances

Complete repair services for home and kitchen appliances - fans, heaters, microwaves, washing machines, refrigerators, electric grinders (Girane/Chakki), and all electrical devices.

Power Solutions

UPS maintenance, inverter repair, power supply replacement, and battery servicing. We ensure your backup power systems work perfectly when you need them.

Printers & Peripherals

Complete repair and maintenance of printers, scanners, photocopiers, and other office peripherals. Toner refilling and cartridge services available.

Why Choose Darpan Enterprises?

Expert Technicians

Highly trained and certified professionals with extensive experience in all types of electronics and electrical repairs.

Quick Turnaround

Fast and efficient service without compromising on quality. Most repairs completed within 24-48 hours.

Affordable Pricing

Competitive rates with transparent quotations. No hidden charges, just honest pricing for quality work.

Quality Guarantee

All repairs come with warranty. We use only genuine parts and follow industry standards for all work.

24/7 Support

Always available for emergency repairs and customer support. WhatsApp, call, or visit us anytime.

On-Site Service

We offer home and office service for certain appliances. Bring your device or we'll come to you.
